CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288. (212)

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Jun-14-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Randall Choy, Esq. for Petitioner: Daisy Ng, present as Guardian at litem for: Alan Chan, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $6,125.00
Medical Lien $4,402.23
Costs $5,243.77
A net balance of $8,729.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 2835 Geary Blvd., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
